title: Artifact tree node component with pinning and timestamp formatting
purpose: Renders individual nodes in a tree view for artifacts, showing name, last modified time, and pinning functionality.
module_context: Exports a memoized React component named ArtifactTreeNode that renders tree items with visual styling, timestamp formatting, and pinning controls.

steps.content: Return a fixed SVG icon element for all nodes.
The icon is a small circle with specific styling for visual consistency.
Calculate the time difference between now and the provided timestamp.
IF the difference is negative, return 'now' as the time indicator.
Convert the difference into seconds and determine the appropriate time unit.
Format and return the time ago string using the determined unit and value.

methods.name: ArtifactTreeNodeImpl
methods.normalized_params: ({ node, selected, onClick, onDoubleClick, onContextMenu, onKeyDown, onTogglePin }: ArtifactTreeNodeProps): React.ReactElement

steps.content: Determine the CSS class name for the node based on selection state and deprecated status.
Render a div element with appropriate accessibility attributes and event handlers.
Display the node's icon using the iconFor function.
Show the node's name with truncation to fit available space.
IF the node has a last modified timestamp, display the formatted time ago string.
IF the node is pinned or a toggle pin handler is provided, render a pin button.
Attach event handlers to the pin button to prevent event propagation and call the toggle pin handler.
